summary: Analytics Dashboard Feature Testing Complete - All Tests Passed. Backend: 12/12 tests passed for GET /api/brand-portal/analytics endpoint. Frontend: Analytics tab renders correctly with 8 metric cards (2 rows of 4), Impressions Over Time area chart, Campaign Performance section (empty state), Top Products horizontal bar chart, and Recent Impressions table.

issues: Console warnings about chart dimensions (-1) - Recharts warning about container width/height. Non-critical, charts render correctly.

critical_code_review_comments: GET /api/brand-portal/analytics correctly returns daily_impressions, campaign_breakdown, product_breakdown, and metrics

Metrics object contains all 13 required fields: total_impressions, total_cost, budget_total, budget_remaining, budget_utilization, avg_cpi, impressions_last_7d, impressions_prev_7d, velocity_change, total_campaigns, active_campaigns, total_products_featured, total_stories
daily_impressions correctly groups data by date with impressions and cost per day using MongoDB $dateFromString aggregation
product_breakdown correctly returns products ranked by impressions (descending) using $unwind on products_featured array
campaign_breakdown returns per-campaign stats (empty array when no campaigns exist - correct behavior)
Velocity change calculation: ((last_7d - prev_7d) / prev_7d * 100) correctly implemented
Frontend Analytics tab labeled 'Analytics' (not 'Impressions') as specified
All charts (Area, Bar, Horizontal Bar) render correctly with Recharts components
seed_data_creation: 30 impressions seeded for brand 'Test Brand Updated' over 14 days (2/22-3/6) with 3 products: SmartReader Pro, LearnTab Kids, StoryPal App. Budget: $100 total.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Analytics Dashboard fully functional. Brand partner testbrand@test.com has 30 seeded impressions displayed across the analytics dashboard. All metrics, charts (AreaChart for daily impressions, BarChart for campaigns, horizontal BarChart for products), and Recent Impressions table working correctly. Authentication requires brand_partner role (403 returned for unauthenticated requests). Note: Console shows Recharts dimension warnings when charts first load - this is a known Recharts issue with ResponsiveContainer and doesn't affect rendering.

frontend_ui_tests: Analytics tab clickable and displays correct content - PASSED
Row 1 metrics (Total Impressions: 30, Total Cost: $1.66, Avg CPI: $0.055, Budget Used: 1.7%) - PASSED
Row 2 metrics (Last 7d: 15, Prev 7d: 15, Velocity: 0%, Stories: 25) - PASSED
Impressions Over Time area chart renders with data - PASSED
Campaign Performance section shows empty state - PASSED (no campaigns created)
Top Products horizontal bar chart with 3 products ranked by impressions - PASSED
Recent Impressions table with Date/Products/Cost columns - PASSED

analytics_dashboard.product_breakdown: PASSED - 3 products ranked: StoryPal App (19), LearnTab Kids (15), SmartReader Pro (9)

ai_integration.note: Analytics endpoint uses MongoDB aggregation pipelines, no AI integration in this feature
